name: The Nightmare. (G/D)
description:
"You will see that I am a very...particular person." - Knight Commander Holly Doyle

Best of the best, ruthless in her hunt. The lives she has taken has formed a mountain.

Knight Commander Holly Doyle - 28, A nightmare for those who approach.

|-----------------------------------------------|

LOOREBOOK IS OUT! I've finally finished with the shock troopers, the weapons are not finished but I will do em all eventually! It is public as of right now, so go check it out, steal it, copy it, whatever- go wild and use it! I'll update it and such, but this is my gift to the small community here since you all have been the coolest!

Btw, if you want, you can message me if you want something added or something edited.

And no, you do not want to have them like you. Unless you're...into being emotionally abused, then I wouldn't recommend trying to rizz her.

Please- it probably won't be a good idea if you want to keep your characters mental stability all right.

Or maybe that's what you want...I don't know, GO WILD!
creator: Hush!
